summary: 118 tokens, 100% description coverage, zero hardcoded colors. Light mode shipped and art-directed: sparse DTCG overrides, dark :root default, [data-theme='light'] opt-in. Contrast is executable — 54 WCAG checks across both modes (incl. worst-case backdrop) run in npm run check and CI. Light mode got a dedicated art-direction pass: mode-aware image treatment (no more muddy veils), elevation-based depth, stronger borders, and a tuned link blue. Playground and docs carry the toggle; switching-brain is pinned dark by design.

priorities.title: Breakpoint tokens deferred
priorities.detail: 3 breakpoint values (768px, 1024px, 767px) used in 8 media queries. Not tokenized yet — responsive behavior is still being defined. Revisit when adding responsive tokens to the DTCG source.

priorities.title: Layout constraints are art-directed
priorities.detail: 5 hardcoded layout values (280px, 320px, 400px, 1400px, 1600px) are playground-specific. They don't warrant tokens unless a second consumer needs the same constraints.

priorities.title: Small structural px are intentional
priorities.detail: 17 instances of 1-6px values (border-radius tweaks, padding adjustments). These are micro-adjustments below the spacing scale — tokenizing them would add overhead without design benefit.

priorities.title: Contrast over photography
priorities.detail: Resolved by the bounded backdrop system: a solid canvas scrim floor + photo capped at backdrop.photo-opacity (0.55 dark / 0.14 light) + tint. check-contrast.mjs now verifies every panel text role against the worst-case backdrop (photo treated as pure black AND pure white) in both modes — text stays AA regardless of photo content. The bleed aesthetic is preserved; the guarantee is photo-independent.

priorities.title: Light-mode visual regression baseline
priorities.detail: Light mode doubles the visual surface. Verification is per-session via browser screenshots; a Playwright baseline (deferred earlier) would now cover 2x the states and is worth re-costing.

priorities.title: Desaturated dark-mode accent variant
priorities.detail: magenta-2 (#d60076) is 100% saturated and can vibrate against the blue canvas. The Material/HIG pattern is a slightly desaturated accent for dark themes. Taste-driven brand decision — explore separately.

priorities.title: Switching-brain paper mode
priorities.detail: The brain is pinned dark (glow-on-dark is the piece). A light variant means re-art-directing glow to shadow — a creative exploration, not a toggle.

priorities.title: Image asset optimization pipeline
priorities.detail: 14MB of raster assets, no AVIF/WebP, no responsive srcset. Below-fold images are now lazy-loaded + decoding=async (initial-load impact addressed) and the backdrop dropped background-attachment:fixed. Full AVIF/WebP pipeline deferred: the approved vite-imagetools needs assets in src/ but they live in public/ — needs an assets-management-flow decision and photographic-quality QA. Scoped in a dedicated follow-up prompt.

strengths: Light mode as sparse overrides — 29 tokens flip, 15 derived tokens re-derive automatically via semantic var() references
Executable contrast contract: 44 checks per run, both modes, in CI — closed the drift risk
Deep-stop mirroring: light text.accent = magenta-1 and text.cool = sky-2, the structural mirror of dark's magenta-4/sky-4 — only possible because all five ramps are monotonic
Mode parity validated: overrides must match base paths, must-flip list enforced
Zero hardcoded colors in component CSS — including named colors (white/black scanned)
All text roles AA+ on every surface in both modes; interactive borders ≥3:1 in both modes
Catalog dogfoods the toggle and shows both bindings per flipping token
100% token description coverage — every $value has a $description
Self-contained token package with fonts — ready for extraction
tokens/dist committed to git — both mode files available after clone, no build step
Bounded backdrop: text contrast over the photograph is now provable in both modes (canvas scrim floor + capped photo opacity), verified by the worst-case backdrop gate
Below-fold images lazy-loaded; reduced-motion honored; transitions narrowed off transition:all
Mode-aware image treatment: images recede by darkening on dark, by desaturating + higher opacity on light — no muddy dark veils on the light canvas
Light mode has real depth: elevation (shadow) replaces dark's glow, borders strengthened, panels separate from canvas
Consistent image-hover language across all four image types (relax filter + uniform opacity lift)
risks: No automated visual regression baseline — and light mode doubled the visual surface (tracked as priority 5)
